Our Products

Built for real problems.
Designed for real people.

Six interconnected AI platforms spanning workforce intelligence, veteran advocacy, women’s wellness, agriculture, education, and enterprise operations.

Enterprise Intelligence

PRISM

Process Routing Intelligence Systems Model

One core operational framework. Infinite industry applications. PRISM maps, routes, and automates enterprise workflows — with company-specific AI modules that plug into a single intelligent core.

Join the waitlist →

AI Workforce Matching

Hypercruit

Verified talent. Accelerated outcomes.

Pilot — Oklahoma CareerTech

Hypercruit is an AI-powered workforce intelligence platform built for CareerTech centers, state agencies, and tribal workforce programs. It replaces the fragmented, subscription-heavy hiring ecosystem with a single, verified, compliant system.

Employers get pre-scored, skills-verified candidates. Students and job seekers get a platform that sees their actual capabilities — not just their resume keywords.

Request a Demo

AI Behavioral Scoring

Multi-dimensional candidate scoring across skills, soft skills, and role fit.

Skills Verification

Credential verification connected to CareerTech completion records.

Compliance Automation

State and federal workforce compliance built into every workflow.

Multi-Portal Architecture

Separate optimized portals for candidates, employers, and administrators.

Disability Intelligence Agency

D.I.A.

The benefits veterans earned. Finally accessible.

Live

D.I.A. is a plain-language VA benefits claims platform that guides veterans through one of the most complex bureaucratic systems in existence. No legal background required.

Veterans describe their conditions in their own words. D.I.A. maps those to VA/ICD codes, pulls BVA case law, auto-fills forms, and generates nexus letters — a print-ready claims package in minutes.

Access D.I.A. →

Plain-Language Input

Describe your condition the way you actually talk.

BVA Case Law Engine

Surfaces Board of Veterans Appeals decisions for your conditions.

VA Form Auto-Fill

Populates the correct VA forms with accurate diagnostic language.

Nexus Letter Generation

Generates formatted nexus letters connecting service history to conditions.

Women's Wellness AI

PauseWell

The first AI companion built for perimenopause and menopause.

App Store & Google Play

PauseWell is the first AI wellness companion designed exclusively for women navigating perimenopause and menopause. Most wellness apps treat these years as a footnote. PauseWell treats them as the focus.

Voice symptom logging, cycle tracking, personalized daily protocols, and evidence-based insights — real information, not generic wellness advice.

Download on App Store

Voice Symptom Logging

Log how you feel in your own words. Powered by Deepgram Nova-2.

Cycle Tracking

Intelligent cycle tracking calibrated for perimenopause.

Personalized Protocols

Daily recommendations built around your specific symptom patterns.

Doctor Report Export

Generate a formatted symptom report for your next appointment.

Farm-to-Table Marketplace

From Our Place

Connecting local producers to the people who want what they grow.

Coming Soon

From Our Place is a regional farm-to-table marketplace connecting local producers directly to consumers across Oklahoma and four neighboring states.

Geo-radius search surfaces producers within your chosen distance. Stripe Connect enables direct producer payments. Automated order management keeps operations clean on both ends.

Join Early Access

Geo-Radius Search

Find producers within your chosen distance.

Direct Producer Payments

Stripe Connect puts money directly in producers hands.

Automated Order Management

12-hour auto-cancel state machine keeps inventory synchronized.

Multi-State Coverage

Launching across Oklahoma, Kansas, Texas, Nebraska, and Louisiana.

K-6 STEM/STEAM Learning

HyperStart

Where the pipeline begins.

Coming Soon

HyperStart is a gamified STEM/STEAM learning platform for K-6 students that starts building the career identity that follows them all the way through to Hypercruit.

A student who discovers they love systems design at age 8 should have a thread that connects that discovery to their first job at 22. HyperStart is where that thread begins.

Express Interest

Gamified STEM/STEAM Curriculum

K-6 learning modules designed as games — engagement-first, curriculum-aligned.

Career Identity Mapping

Connects student interests to real career pathways from the earliest grades.

Longitudinal Profile

Student data feeds directly into Hypercruit at career stage.

Rural & Universal Access

Designed for accessibility across rural and underserved school districts nationwide.

Middle School · Career & Entrepreneurship

STEMpreneur

What problem will you solve?

Coming Soon

STEMpreneur is a middle school platform that treats career discovery and entrepreneurship as the same journey. Students explore 12 career paths, build a real business around a problem they care about, and develop the whole-person skills to see it through.

The curriculum spans STEM/STEAM and goes further — weaving in theology, philosophy, and humanities. Because the students who will change the world are curious, ethical, and self-aware.

Express Interest

12 Career Paths

Guided modules uncovering where natural strengths and curiosity intersect with opportunity.

Business Simulation

Students build and run a simulated business — market research, product development, pitching.

AI & Financial Literacy

Real AI and money concepts applied directly to their entrepreneurship journey.

Philosophy & Humanities

Ethical reasoning and philosophical curiosity woven throughout the curriculum.
